name: skill-framework-native
description: Native Codex integration for the local skill framework, memory system, and runtime artifacts.

interface.shortDescription: Local framework skill, memory, and runtime bundle for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Packages the repository's native integration skill so Codex can discover the local skill framework without an extra framework MCP layer.
defaultPrompt: Use the local framework skill and router-rs commands to inspect memory and routing state.
Refresh the workspace bootstrap bundle before planning framework work.
Search the local skill graph instead of grepping the repo first.
